svg.text: react-kit · Resolume Avenue 7.27.1 · the “Expert” preset (Ease-of-Use = same grid + Track-knob dashboard only)
DASHED = proposed · needs a UI specimen
→ Selected-Clip Dashboard 1–8 · rides the clip on screen (PROVEN)
→ Layer Dashboard 1–8 · banked by Track Select (Tier B)
CLIP GRID — top row = top visual layer (Pulse), one row per layer
whole-look launch (Ableton-style) · Bank ◀▶ pages more columns
CHANNEL STRIP buttons · Clip Stop = eject layer · Activator = layer on (LED lit = visible) · Solo = layer solo · Rec-Arm = Comp-FX arm 1–8
1–4 = Layer Master (numeric mixer order) 5–8 = Layer transition duration, clamped 0–2 s (DASHED)
DRY ⟷ Performance FX (Crossfader Phase) · excludes opacity / Freeze / blackout / strobe
SOLID = documented / rig-proven fact · DASHED = proposed, capture a UI specimen before trusting it · two presets ship every time: Ease-of-Use + Expert
